diagrams.title: Memory Hierarchy Pyramid
diagrams.description: Shows the pyramid structure of memory hierarchy from fastest/smallest to slowest/largest
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the speed vs size tradeoff in memory hierarchy and understand why caches are necessary

diagrams.title: Cache Address Mapping - Direct Mapping
diagrams.description: Shows how a 32-bit address is divided into tag, index, and offset fields for direct-mapped cache
diagrams.purpose: Understand how addresses map to cache locations and how cache lookup works in direct mapping

diagrams.title: Cache Read Operation Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow of CPU requesting data from cache memory
elements: Check valid bit in cache line
diagrams.purpose: Understand the cache read operation and what happens during hit vs miss scenarios
